title: Paris Honeymoon
writer: Frank Butler, Don Hartman, Angela Sherwood
actors: Bing Crosby, Franciska Gaal, Akim Tamiroff
plot: A Texas millionaire travels to Europe to meet his girlfriend, a European countess. He stops in a rustic mountain village and meets a beautiful peasant girl. He falls in love with her, then must decide if he wants her or the rich c...
